name: Tangy Lemon Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix butter with flour, confectioners' sugar and lemon peel until combined.
2. Divide dough in half; on a floured surface, roll each half to a 6-inch long cylinder.
3. Wrap each half in plastic wrap; refrigerate for 1 hour.
4. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Grease a large baking sheet.
6. Cut each roll of chilled dough crosswise into 1/2-inch thick slices.
7. Place cookies cut side up on the prepared baking sheet.
8. Bake for 12 minutes at 325 degrees Fahrenheit, or until the top of the cookies are firm to the touch and lightly browned on the bottom.
9. With a spatula, remove from oven and place on a wire rack.
10. Sprinkle with additional confectioners' sugar before serving.
